mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, email, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username=#{username}, password=#{password}, email=#{email}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
